=== type(x) is T ===

=== type(T) is type ===
True

=== isinstance(T, type) ===
True

=== issubclass ===
True

=== __name__ / __qualname__ / __module__ ===
int
str
bool
list
type
int

=== __mro__ ===
('int', 'object')
('float', 'object')
('str', 'object')
('bool', 'int', 'object')
('list', 'object')
('dict', 'object')
('tuple', 'object')
('bytes', 'object')
('bytearray', 'object')
('set', 'object')
('frozenset', 'object')
('complex', 'object')
('memoryview', 'object')
('type', 'object')
=== __bases__ ===
